name: magi
description: Redis-backed cross-agent messaging for CLI AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Message other CLI agents through Redis.
interface.longDescription: magi provides Redis-backed cross-agent messaging for CLI AI agents, with team membership, invites, inboxes, history, and watch mode exposed through a Rust CLI.
defaultPrompt: Send a magi message to another agent.
Show the current magi team members.
